docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 (SECOND DEFENDANT ADDED) FILED BY CRISTOBAL, ABSALOM AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD'S CORP HUSAIN, SYED A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC 12, 2007 BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT;CLERK;F.RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIPT RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO PRENTICE HALL, AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR MCDONALD'S CORP, DEFENDANT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-30-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUSAIN, SYED A
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRISTOBAL, ABSALOM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCDONALD'S CORP ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL RECORDS SHOW THAT PLAINTIFF SUFFERED AN INTESTINAL INFECTION THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT IT WAS CAUSED BY THE FOOD FROM THE DEFENDANT'S RESTAURANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO SYED A HUSAIN.
